text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This year's Arima Kinen is almost upon us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In preparation, I've been staying up late every
night fine-tuning training routines and
formulating race strategies.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rrruuumble!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Brum-brum-brum-brum!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: CRRRASH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, the still night air is torn apart by
deafening crashes and bangs!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: What the heck is going on?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I'm in!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, keep it down! You want me to get busted or
something?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Just a little breaking and entering. Had to use a
file, drill, and a chainsaw to get through the wall,
but I did it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I might've irreversibly broken a thing or two along
the way, but hey, it's nothing to worry about.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What has she done to my wall? ...Actually, I don't
want to know.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
FYI, it's your fault for not having a chimney I
could shimmy down. You could afford to reel in
that shocked attitude of yours too.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What're you so scared about, anyway? You
should be over the moon that someone as lovely
as me is paying you a clandestine visit, armed
with a bunch of cool tools.
choice_data_list: Every part of that sentence is terrifying...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Yeesh, people nowadays have such weak hearts.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Here, gifts from Santa Golshi. Toughen up a bit,
will ya?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She plops something heavy into my hands.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: High-quality steel, perfect for making weaponry.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I know you've been feeling weak, but that'll all
change once you steelify your body with swords
and armor.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Well, I'm off. Happy holidays.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm not sure how to take this turn of events, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I still can't get over the chainsaw massacre that
happened to my wall...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You're just living the life, huh? So many people
would weep in envy if they found out you got
such a gorgeous gift.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I really don't think anyone would weep over the
hunk of metal I got. At least not in envy...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: But enough of that. Who lives above you?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Eh, I was just wondering if anyone lives above
you. If someone does, we miiight have a problem.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Like, if they don't get out of the way when I drill
the hole in the ceiling for this fir tree, they're
gonna be collateral damage.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Just a lil' decorating. I brought a massive fir tree
with me, but it's so tall I'll need to make some
space for it through the ceiling.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The tree Gold Ship brought is over thirty meters
tall...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I politely decline putting it up in my room and
donate it to the academy for an outdoor holiday
event instead.
